Name: Monthly Pass A
Description: 1. Purchase [Black Card Monthly Pass A] to claim 100 Black Cards daily at 05:00 UTC for 30 days.\n2. Each purchase extends the duration by 30 days, up to a maximum of 180 days. [Black Card Monthly Pass A] and [Black Card Monthly Pass C] cannot be active at the same time.\n3. Upon purchase, you will receive 300 Black Cards immediately.

Name: Monthly Pass C
Description: 1. Purchase [Black Card Monthly Pass C] to claim 90 Black Cards daily at 05:00 UTC for 30 days.\n2. Each purchase extends the duration by 30 days, up to a maximum of 180 days. [Black Card Monthly Pass A] and [Black Card Monthly Pass C] cannot be active at the same time.\n3. Upon purchase, you will receive 300 Black Cards immediately.
